name: Stakeholder Change Detector
description: Monitors key accounts for champion departures, new decision-makers, and org changes using LinkedIn and CRM data.
longDescription: Watches for job changes in key contacts at your customer accounts by monitoring LinkedIn profile updates and CRM contact records. Detects champion departures, new executive hires, role changes, and organizational restructuring. Reports changes to the assigned CSM with suggested actions — from scheduling introductions with new stakeholders to escalating accounts that lost their champion.
